summary: Completed testing of HR Sync and Access Request features. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Found 2 CRITICAL security issues with duplicate route definitions.

critical.issue: SECURITY: First route definition doesn't filter by user_id for non-admins. Regular users can see ALL org access requests instead of just their own. Duplicate route at line 2500 has correct filtering but is never reached.
SECURITY: First route definition doesn't check admin role. Any authenticated user can approve/reject access requests. Duplicate route at line 2513 has correct admin check but is never reached.

minor.issue: Routes defined twice at lines 2155-2207 and 2442-2557. FastAPI uses first matching route, causing security issues. Remove duplicate routes at lines 2155-2207.

passed_tests: HR Sync: Regular user denied trigger (403)
HR Sync: GET /api/hr-sync/logs returns sync history
HR Sync: Regular user denied logs (403)
Catalog: GET /api/catalog/apps returns apps with has_access flag
Catalog: Admin has access to all apps
Catalog: User sees correct has_access status
Access Requests: Filter by status works
Frontend: HR Sync page loads with Sync Now button, stats, history
Frontend: Access Requests page loads with filter buttons
Frontend: App Catalog page loads with app cards
action_items: CRITICAL: Remove duplicate route definitions at lines 2155-2207 in server.py. Keep only the routes at lines 2442-2557 which have proper security checks.
Alternative: Add admin role check to PUT route at line 2209 and user_id filter to GET route at line 2157
critical_code_review_comments: DUPLICATE ROUTES: /api/access-requests routes defined twice (lines 2155-2207 and 2442-2557). First definition lacks security checks.
SECURITY: First GET /api/access-requests (line 2155) shows all org requests to any user - should filter by user_id for non-admins
SECURITY: First PUT /api/access-requests/{id} (line 2208) allows any user to approve/reject - should check admin role
HR Sync working correctly: 1939 total employees synced from Adrenalin HRMS
Email notifications configured but not tested (per instructions to avoid spam)
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test disabled user for login test
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Sync and Access Request features are functionally working but have CRITICAL security issues due to duplicate route definitions. The first route definitions (lines 2155-2207) lack proper security checks. Main agent needs to remove these duplicate routes or add security checks. After fix, retest: 1) Regular user should only see their own access requests, 2) Regular user should NOT be able to approve/reject requests.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Duplicate route definitions in server.py. Routes for /api/access-requests are defined twice - first at lines 2155-2207 (without proper security) and again at lines 2442-2557 (with proper security). FastAPI uses the first matching route, so the insecure routes are being used.
reproduction_steps: 2. GET /api/access-requests - user sees ALL org requests (should only see own)
3. If there's a pending request, PUT /api/access-requests/{id}?action=approve - user can approve (should be denied)
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Remove lines 2155-2207 from server.py OR add security checks to those routes
